LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Facilities.label: facility benefits
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Facilities.description: Benefits granted by settlement and ship facilities. The active facilities are listed below.
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Workshop.label: workshop benefits
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Workshop.description: Access to a well-equipped workshop makes every job go faster.
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Granary.label: granary benefits
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Granary.description: Proper storage and field tools make farm work quicker and less wasteful.
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Clinic.label: clinic benefits
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Clinic.description: Clean facilities steady the hands of anyone tending the sick.
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_School.label: academy benefits
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_School.description: A quiet study hall and a good library speed up research.
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Barracks.label: barracks training
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_Barracks.description: Regular drills sharpen aim and footwork.
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_CargoHold.label: cargo hold benefits
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_CargoHold.description: Clever stowage lets the crew haul far heavier loads.
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_CrewQuarters.label: crew quarters benefits
LanguageData.Rpt_Hediff_CrewQuarters.description: Proper bunks make rest genuinely restful.
